Trump is fast-tracking Enbridge’s Line 5 pipeline, which has moved crude oil & natural gas liquids between Wisconsin & Ontario since 1953. Michigan & environmental groups have been fighting to shut down the pipeline due to fears of a catastrophic spill in the Great Lakes.
